CustomField.description: If ticked, an SMS notification will be sent to the Contact. This has no effect if updated after a record has been created. To resend an SMS notification, use the action button instead.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If ticked, an SMS notification will be sent to the Contact. This has no effect if updated after a record has been created. To resend an SMS notification, use the action button instead.
CustomField.label: Send SMS on Creation
